title: 2) General health condition
text:
Meticulous diagnosis including past history and family history should be done. Skin
condition is affected by various general health issues. Treatment is not only for the skin, but
for the whole body.
Here are some red ﬂags to consider:
• mental disorder including OCD, depression, and body image distortion
• anti-coagulant usage
• heavy smoking / alcohol
• repetitive artiﬁcial sun tanning
